name: Peril in the Pines
short_description: Peril in the Pines is a short & simple first-person horror game where the player is trapped on an island with strange creatures. The player must collect the resources to fix their boat before being caught and getting trapped forever.
detailed_description:
You don’t know how you arrived on this strange island—all the memories you had of before don’t exist in your mind. Once you awake, you see a boat floating beside you. Sadly, it is damaged and needs repairing. With your trusty torch, your only hope is venturing deep into the dark creepy island to find parts you can use to fix it. Whilst exploring the island, you see an old journal and several torn pages. You weren’t the first one here.

Gameplay:

Peril in the Pines is a short & simple first-person Horror game where you must gather five pieces to fix your boat and escape the island you are trapped on. The island is filled with strange creatures that are out to catch you. Every creature works differently, use what you learn in the remains of an old journal to not get caught.

Some roam slowly, others come straight for you. Each one can be dealt with. You just have to survive.
